endpoints.name: Returns all regions present in Tanzania
endpoints.description: Fetches all regions present in Tanzania and then return a response as json
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country.

endpoints.name: Returns all districts in region
endpoints.description: Returns a post code and all districts in a specified region
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: Returns all wards in a district
endpoints.description: Returns all wards in a  specified district and district postcode
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country. Replace {{DISTRICT}} with a real district. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: Returns all streets in a ward
endpoints.description: Returns all streets in a specified ward and ward postcode
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{WARD}} with a real ward. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country. Replace {{DISTRICT}} with a real district. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region.

endpoints.name: Returns all neighborhood in a street
endpoints.description: Returns all neighborhood in a specified street
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{WARD}} with a real ward. Replace {{REGION}} with a real region. Replace {{DISTRICT}} with a real district. Replace {{STREET}} with a real street. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country.
